race.comment: POUR BENN (3) produced a career-best performance last start over 1500m at Kembla when beaten under a length, making up plenty of late ground. Cherry ripe after three runs back and his best recent efforts look a fair bit better than what his rivals have served up. MOORDYUP (8) ran a nice race while fresh at Wyong two back then struggled to keep up over 1350m at the same track last time. In good hands and probably wants a bit of ground now so stick with her. THE CONFIDANTE (1) chimed in late and got quite close over the mile at Kembla two back. Unsuited by the stop-start nature of the race last start here in a run worth forgiving. Lightly raced and capable of mixing it with these. IVY PRINCESS (7) is a one-paced filly who should appreciate getting out to this distance for the first time. EMERALD HILLS (2) caught the eye at Taree on debut recently and will enjoy this step up in distance.
